events.format:
**Track:** 100m, 200m, 400m, 800m, 1500m, 3000m, 5000m, 10000m, 4x100m Relay, 4x400m Relay

**Field:** Long Jump, Triple Jump, High Jump, Shot Put, Discus Throw, Javelin Throw

Each participant may enter 2 track + 1 field event OR 2 field + 1 track event. Up to 2 relay events allowed in addition. Relay teams: 4 participants per relay.

events.categories: Men's Singles, Women's Singles, Men's Doubles, Women's Doubles, Mixed Doubles
events.teamSize: Min 4 male + 3 female, max 12 players (including guests)
events.format:
Team match consists of 5 games: Men's Singles, Women's Singles, Men's Doubles, Women's Doubles, Mixed Doubles. Win by 3 out of 5 games.

League stage: Best-of-3 sets to 21 points. Knockout format communicated after registration.

Tiebreak: matches won → game difference → point difference → head-to-head.

Official shuttle: Yonex Mavis 350. Non-marking badminton shoes mandatory. BWF rules apply.

events.guestPlayers: Max 2 per team, max 1 on court at a time
events.format:
Men's: 5v5 full court. Women's: 5v5 or 3v3 half court (depending on team sizes).

**12 teams in 4 pools** → Round robin → Semifinals → Finals.

**Pool 1:** CSA, CNS, BioEng
**Pool 2:** DOMS, Mech, UG Seniors
**Pool 3:** ECE, CeNSE, CES
**Pool 4:** CPS, Electrical, UG Juniors

FIBA rules apply. 4 quarters of 10 minutes each (running time except last minute of final quarter). 24-second shot clock.

Each team plays 3 games: 1 Singles + 2 Doubles. Only 3 player combinations allowed per team. Best 2 of 3 games wins the match.

Each game: 25 points or 45 minutes (whichever is earlier).

Indian Carrom rules apply. Queen = 3 points, other tokens = 1 point. 15 seconds per shot.

events.teamSize: Team: 4 open + 1 female + 2 reserves (max 2 guests per roster, 1 per match)
events.guestPlayers: Max 2 per roster, max 1 per match
events.format:
**Individual:** Swiss System — Blitz (5 min + 3 sec increment). FIDE rules. Tiebreak: Armageddon for 1st place; Buchholz for others.

**Team:** Group Stage (10 min + 5 sec) → Double Elimination (30 min + 30 sec). 5 boards per match (at least 1 female). Board 5 (Female Board) can only be substituted by a female player. Rolling substitution with 2 subs. Departments may register up to 2 teams.

events.categories: Men's Road Bike, Women's Road Bike, Men's Hybrid/Mountain, Women's Hybrid/Mountain
events.format:
**Qualifiers:** Individual Time Trial (2 laps) — only if >20 registrations per category.

**Finals:** Road racing with laps. Men Road: 7+1 laps, Women Road: 4+1 laps, Men Hybrid: 5+1 laps, Women Hybrid: 2+1 laps.

Rolling start with motorized vehicle pacing on first lap. Helmets mandatory. No e-bikes. GPS tracking required.

events.teamSize: Men's: 10+1 (GK), min 8 to play, rolling subs; Women's: 15-min halves
events.guestPlayers: Max 4 on pitch at a time; alumni count as guests
events.format:
**Men's:** Knockouts (6 matches, Physics bye) → Group Stage (2 groups of 4) → Semis → Final. KO & Group: 20-min halves. Semis & Final: 25-min halves.

**Women's:** Round robin (all play all) → Top 2 play Final. 15-min halves.

Points: Win = 3 | Draw = 1 | Loss = 0. Best loser from KO advances as 8th team.

schedule.title: K4: CSA FC vs DoMinatorS (Men's KO)
K6: Mech Spartans vs MTE (Men's KO)
S1: 1st Group A vs 2nd Group B (Men's Semi)
S2: 1st Group B vs 2nd Group A (Men's Semi)
Men's Final: Semi 1 Winner vs Semi 2 Winner
Pool A: Chemical Sciences vs UG Juniors 2
Pool B: UG Juniors 1 vs DESE-1
Pool C: UG Seniors 2 vs CeNSE-1
Pool D: UG Seniors 1 vs ICER-1

events.categories: 2 Open Doubles + 1 Mixed Doubles per match
events.teamSize: 5 players + 1 backup; at least 1 player of different gender
events.format:
**28 teams** in 4 pools of 7 (partial seeding). Pool stage: knockout within each pool → 1 pool topper each. Round Robin: 4 pool toppers play all vs all. Top 2 → Final, 3rd & 4th → Bronze Match.

Each match: 3 games (2 Open Doubles + 1 Mixed Doubles). Game to 10 points (switch sides at 5). MVP (Male & Female) awarded by goals scored in round robin stage.

Game to 15 points. 3-minute halftime at 8 points or halfway mark. 75-second timeout per game. Gendered pull system.

Non-contact sport. Captain submits MVP from opposite team after each game (Spirit Circle). Game observer's ruling is final.

Gender ratio: 4 Men : 3 Women.

events.guestPlayers: Max 2 on field at a time
events.format: Only captain registration required (on behalf of team). Details shared after registration closes.

Individual registration — teams formed based on participants by organizers. Prior hockey experience required (school level or above).

Trial session in the week before the game (mandatory attendance). Trial may be conducted to assess skill level.

FIH rules apply. 11 players on field.

events.teamSize: Max 12 members, 7 on court, min 7 players
events.format:
**Men's:** 30 min (two 15-min halves, 5-min break); Semis/Finals: 40 min.
**Women's:** 20 min (two 10-min halves); Semis/Finals: 30 min.

1 point per defender out. Bonus line: 1 point if 6+ defenders on ground. League: 3 points for win.

Tiebreak: 5 alternate raids → Golden Raid if still tied.

AKFI rules. Weight restrictions: Men 85kg, Women 75kg max.

Two innings of 14 minutes each (7 min chase + 7 min defend, 5-min break). Finals: 9 minutes per inning.

1 point per defender out (chasing team). League: 2 points for win.

Tiebreak: Sudden death — time to catch first opponent runner. KKFI rules apply.

events.categories: Men's Singles, Women's Singles, Men's Doubles, Women's Doubles, Mixed Doubles
events.format:
All knockout format. Minimum 4 entries per category required (otherwise exhibition match).

Players can participate in all 3 formats (singles, doubles, mixed). Inter- and intra-department doubles teams allowed.

3 lifts: Squat, Bench Press, Deadlift. 3 attempts per lift, best counts. Total = Squat + Bench + Deadlift. Tiebreak: lighter lifter ranks higher.

**Men's Weight Classes:** <60kg, 60–70kg, 70–80kg, 80–90kg, 90+kg
**Women's Weight Classes:** <50kg, 50–60kg, 60–70kg, 70–80kg, 80+kg

Smith Machine for squats. Straps allowed for deadlifts only.

events.categories: Open Singles, Men's Doubles, Mixed Doubles, Women's Doubles
events.format:
Knockout throughout.

**Men's Doubles:** Rounds 1–2: 1 singles (30min) each table + 1 doubles tiebreaker (45min). QF/SF/Finals progressively longer.

**Mixed Doubles:** Similar structure with longer time limits (45–60min).

**Women's Doubles:** Format depends on number of registrations.

WPBSA rulebook applies. Players pre-decide table allocation, cannot switch.

**Events:** 50m Freestyle, 50m Breast Stroke, 50m Back Stroke, 50m Butterfly, 500m Freestyle, 4x50m Freestyle Relay.

No cap on individual event participants per department. Relay teams: max 2 per department (4 participants per relay).

Dates: March 31 – April 1, 2026 (tentative).

schedule.title: M3: Winner M1 vs Winner M2
M8: Winner M6 vs Winner M7
M12: Winner M10 vs Winner M11
M15: Winner M13 vs Winner M14
M19: Winner M16 vs Winner M17
M22: Winner M9 vs Winner M18

events.categories: Men's Singles, Women's Singles, 2 Open Singles, Open Doubles
events.teamSize: 5 players (4 compulsory + 1 optional); at least 1 female in playing 4
events.format:
**32 teams** in seeded knockout bracket (Apr 1–5) → League stage (8 teams in 2 pools of 4, round-robin) → Semifinals → Finals.

Knockout: best of 3 sets. League/Semis/Finals: best of 5 sets. Each match: Men's Singles, Women's Singles, 2 Open Singles, Open Doubles. First to 3 games wins.

Seeding based on top 8 teams from Spectrum 2025. Mathematics-A (seed 1) and CeNSE-A (seed 2) receive byes.

Best of 3 sets, 25 points per set (rally scoring). 2-3-2 player position on court.

Court: 12.2m x 18.3m, net height 2.2m, 1m neutral boxes.

Catch with both hands, return with one hand only. 3-second release time. No double touches. 2 timeouts of 30 seconds per set.

events.guestPlayers: Max 2 on court at any time; alumni counted as guests
events.format:
Pools → League → Knockouts (if needed) → Quarterfinals → Semifinals → 3rd-place match → Final.

Best of 3 sets (25-25-15 points), except Semis/Finals. League scoring: 2 points for win, 1 for technical forfeit.

FIVB rules with NO ROTATION (fixed player positions). 10-minute grace period before walkover.

Open to all IISc community (students, staff, professors, alumni, interns).

Match schedule: 5 PM – 12 AM, including holiday mornings if needed.
